cleavage agent: digested with trypsin [Promega] overnight at 37 ºC.
enrichment method: the phosphopeptide enrichment experiment, digested peptides were further captured by magnetic titanium dioxide beads [Pierce] according to the manufacturer’s specifications.
fragmentation method: followed by ten data-dependent collision induced dissocation (CID) MS/MS spectra.
instrument: electrosprayed directly into an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer [Thermo Scientific].
ionization type: the eluted peptides were electrosprayed directly into an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer.
labeling: peptides trypsin digestion directly on beads.
reduction reagent: reduced and alkylated with 10 mM Tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine hydrochloride.
